1024.reason: [This should call lexer.getAndNext() to consume the token, but it only peeks. If there's no ')', the parser doesn't advance and may cause infinite loops or incorrect error line reporting. Also, after adding error 'j', it should still attempt to recover by treating current token as ')' to continue parsing.]
